creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #2)
Thank you.
USES=localbase does not work in this case.
FAILED: eglretrace 
: && /usr/bin/c++ -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -isystem /usr/local/include -fvisibility=hidden -Wall -Wno-sign-compare -fno-strict-aliasing -Wno-pointer-bool-conversion -fno-rtti -fno-exceptions -fmessage-length=0 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -isystem /usr/local/include  -DNDEBUG -flto=thin -Wl,--undefined-version -fstack-protector-strong    -Xlinker --dependency-file=retrace/CMakeFiles/eglretrace.dir/link.d retrace/CMakeFiles/eglretrace.dir/glws_waffle.cpp.o retrace/CMakeFiles/eglretrace.dir/glproc_egl.cpp.o -o eglretrace  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib:  retrace/libretrace_common.a  retrace/libglretrace_common.a  helpers/libglhelpers.a  dispatch/libglproc.a  -lwaffle-1  /usr/local/lib/libX11.so  -lpthread  retrace/libretrace_common.a  lib/image/libimage.a  thirdparty/md5/libmd5.a  /usr/local/lib/libpng.so  lib/trace/libcommon.a  lib/guids/libguids.a  lib/highlight/libhighlight.a  lib/os/libos.a  thirdparty/libbacktrace.a  thirdparty/libsnappy.a  /usr/lib/libz.so  /usr/local/lib/libbrotlidec.so  -lpthread && :
ld: error: unable to find library -lwaffle-1
